case_title: AD FINANCIAL TRUST 2003-A VS. JEFFREY C SEYLER et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-05-2007 CONTINUED TO DEC-21-2007 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2008 CONTINUED TO MAY-07-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LOIS JONES , CSR# 3689 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST MARK D. WALSH, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-06-2008, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-21-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LOIS JONES , CSR# 3689 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
